roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/MOPC 1385:LACK OF EVIDENCE /X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE ASOF 1-27-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/

/CAL PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X COURT ORDRS CLIENT TO PARTICIPATE IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT THE SUPPORT SYSTEMS HOME LOCATED AT 264 N, MORRISON AVENUE IN SAN JOSE, CALIFORNIA, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAMON FRIDAY, MAY 2, 2014,  ADULT PAROLE IS ARRANGING TRANSPORTATION,ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM,SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENTANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  COURT SIGNS ORDER RELEASING CLIENT TO THE STAFF/AGENTS OF THE DIVISION OF ADULT PAROLE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT AND DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/SHER/X:THEREMAND IS NUN PRO TUNC TO 04-06-14,/NB/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO, AND STATUS OF PLACEMENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:AGENT CHEW REQUESTS A CORRECTION OF AN ERROR ON THE PETITION:  COUNT 1 SHOULD REFLECT THE FOLLOWING VIOLATION:  FAILURE TO REPORT TO DAPO,/        /PDP/WIAPTR/X:THE PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS, AND STIPULATES TO PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAMPURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:03-06-14/X:COURT ORDERS A 4011,6 REQUESTING THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION: (1) AN EVALUATION TO DETERMINE IF MR, SAIYAD QUALIFIES FOR A CONSERVATORSHIP; AND(2) INFORMATION REGARDING MEDICATIONCOMPLIANCE,/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND STATUS OF CONSERVATORSHIP/
/CAL PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD TO SEOR DISPO/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO SET OR DISPO,/
